SparSCit

  • API Reference
SparSCit
  • Embedding (sparscit.em)
  • View page source

Embedding (sparscit.em)

Dimensionality reduction and embedding methods for single-cell data. Includes PCA, spectral embedding, UMAP, dendrogram, and landscape embedding.

  • src.embedding._pca.pca() — Principal Component Analysis

  • src.embedding._spectral.spectral() — Spectral embedding for sparse data

  • src.embedding._spectral.multiview_spectral() — Multi-view spectral embedding

  • src.embedding._umap.umap() — UMAP embedding

  • src.embedding._dendrogram.dendrogram() — Compute dendrogram

  • src.embedding._landscape.landscape() — Create landscape embedding from neighborhood clusters
